data.title: Create scripts/ticket/ Python package directory
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Overview
Create the plugins/dso/scripts/ticket/ directory as an empty Python package. This is a scaffolding prerequisite that must complete before ticket processor extraction task (f046-3235) runs — that task places extracted processors inside this package.

## Files to Create
- plugins/dso/scripts/ticket/__init__.py — empty Python package init file

## Implementation
Create plugins/dso/scripts/ticket/__init__.py with content:
  """Ticket processor package — populated by ticket-reducer extraction task."""

The extraction task (f046-3235: ticket-reducer processors) will add re-export statements to this __init__.py as it creates processor modules inside this package.

## Acceptance Criteria

Unit test exemption (integration exemption criterion 2: scaffolding task — no behavioral contract to assert, any test would be a change-detector verifying file existence only).

- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py 2>/dev/null || true
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/ticket/ directory exists
  Verify: test -d $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/ticket/__init__.py exists
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket/__init__.py
